query:
-- Check assignment status of invoice services
SELECT 
  CASE WHEN customerExternalId IS NULL OR customerExternalId = '' OR customerExternalId = 'NULL' THEN 'Unassigned' ELSE customerExternalId END as assignment,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  SUM(monthlyCost) as totalCost
FROM services
WHERE provider = 'Telstra' AND serviceType = 'Mobile' AND supplierAccount = '586992900'
GROUP BY assignment
ORDER BY count DESC;
